# arubasdwan_app_dns_classification (Resource)

Manages a DNS domain-based application definition in the Aruba SD-WAN Orchestrator. Uses the /gms/rest/applicationDefinition/dnsClassification API endpoints.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "arubasdwan_app_dns_classification" "example" {
  name       = "Office365"
  domain     = "*.office365.com"
  confidence = 100
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `confidence` (Number) The confidence level of the application classification (1-100).
- `domain` (String) The DNS domain pattern (e.g. "*.example.com"). Used as the unique key.
- `name` (String) The name of the application.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the application. Defaults to "".
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the application is disabled. Defaults to false.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The domain used as identifier.
